# Responsible Use Concern

Thank you for helping review the safety and responsible-use boundaries of MATRIX v0.2.

Use this template to report concerns related to misuse, privacy, unsafe interpretation, public-sector automation, cyber safety, procurement integrity, or governance ambiguity.

---

## 1. Concern Area

Please select all that apply:

- [ ] AI-assisted public authority decision-making
- [ ] Human oversight ambiguity
- [ ] Responsibility ownership ambiguity
- [ ] Fail-closed governance ambiguity
- [ ] Privacy-by-design concern
- [ ] Raw personal data risk
- [ ] Confidential procurement data risk
- [ ] Cyber safety boundary concern
- [ ] Offensive cyber interpretation risk
- [ ] Auditability concern
- [ ] Contestability concern
- [ ] Institutional accountability concern
- [ ] Misuse or unsafe interpretation
- [ ] Documentation ambiguity
- [ ] Other:

---

## 2. Affected File or Section

Please indicate the affected file, section, schema, example, or documentation page.

Examples:

```text
README.md
SECURITY.md
schemas/MATRIX-v0.2-core.schema.json
schemas/MATRIX-v0.2-cyber.ext.schema.json
schemas/MATRIX-v0.2-procurement.ext.schema.json
docs/MATRIX-v0.2-Technical-Note.md
examples/event.cyber.example.json

Affected file or section:

3. Description of the Concern

Describe the responsible-use concern.

Please do not include secrets, credentials, personal data, exploit code, malware samples, or confidential institutional information.

Describe the concern here.


---

4. Potential Impact

Explain the potential impact.

Consider whether the concern could affect:

human oversight;

legal responsibility;

public-sector accountability;

fail-closed behaviour;

privacy-by-design;

cyber safety;

procurement integrity;

institutional resilience;

contestability;

auditability.


Describe the potential impact here.


---

5. Suggested Mitigation

If you have a suggested mitigation, describe it here.

Examples:

clarify documentation;

refine schema field description;

add validation rule;

add responsible-use warning;

adjust example data;

narrow controlled vocabulary;

improve SECURITY.md;

add fail-closed condition;

strengthen human oversight language.


Suggested mitigation:


---

6. Safety and Privacy Confirmation

Please confirm that this issue does not publicly include:

[ ] API keys;

[ ] passwords;

[ ] credentials;

[ ] private keys;

[ ] raw personal data;

[ ] confidential procurement data;

[ ] confidential incident data;

[ ] exploit instructions;

[ ] malware code;

[ ] operational attack details;

[ ] private infrastructure details.


If any such content is involved, please redact it before submitting the issue.


---

7. Research Status Acknowledgement

Please acknowledge:

[ ] MATRIX v0.2 is a research artefact.

[ ] MATRIX v0.2 is not a deployed public-sector system.

[ ] MATRIX v0.2 supports AI-assisted decision-preparation, not automated public authority decisions.

[ ] MATRIX v0.2 must preserve human oversight, responsibility ownership, traceability, auditability, and fail-closed governance.

Add any additional context, references, examples, or related issues.
